scripts.dev:user: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev -w user-backend" "npm run dev -w user-frontend"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev -w admin-backend" "npm run dev -w admin-frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n user-api,user-web,admin-api,admin-web "npm run dev -w user-backend" "npm run dev -w user-frontend" "npm run dev -w admin-backend" "npm run dev -w admin-frontend"
